overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world western game. A character in a cowboy hat and coat walks steadily through sunlit grasslands toward a massive rock formation, then descends into a narrow, dusty canyon with towering red rock walls.

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along a dirt path through golden grass toward a large rock formation on the horizon

entered.detail: massive reddish-brown rock outcrop dominating the horizon ahead
large deciduous tree with green foliage on the left side of the field
gentle slope covered in dry golden grass rising to the right
worn earth trail cutting through the grass that the character follows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive open grassland bathed in warm afternoon sunlight. A massive rock formation looms ahead on the horizon while scattered oak trees and dry vegetation dot the landscape. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character progresses along a worn dirt trail.

events.description: character enters the rocky canyon area where the terrain becomes more enclosed and dust becomes visible in the air
sunlight becomes increasingly diffused and shadowed as the canyon walls rise and dust filters the light

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward into the narrowing canyon passage, approaching the misty entrance between rock walls

entered.detail: tall canyon walls with distinct horizontal sedimentary layers in reddish-brown tones
atmospheric dust and mist hanging in the air between the canyon walls, catching the light
sparse desert shrubs and small bushes growing at the base of the rock walls

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a canyon entrance with towering red rock walls on either side. Dust and mist hang in the air, creating a hazy atmosphere that diffuses the sunlight. The path becomes rockier and more defined as the character moves deeper into the narrowing passage, with sparse scrub vegetation replacing the open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with high walls

events.description: path narrows significantly into a tight canyon corridor with towering vertical rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: character walks through the deep shadowed canyon, navigating the narrow passage between high rock walls

entered.detail: steep vertical rock faces rising high on both sides, creating a confined corridor
geological strata visible in the canyon walls showing distinct horizontal banding patterns

segments.scene_description: Deep within the canyon, the passage narrows dramatically with towering red rock walls rising steeply on both sides. The sky is mostly obscured above, with only a thin strip of light visible through the canyon gap. Shadows dominate the scene while the character continues along the rocky trail toward a brighter area visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, sunlit grassland into the claustrophobic depths of a towering red rock canyon. It begins by following a character along a worn dirt trail through open plains dotted with oak trees, moving steadily toward a massive rock formation on the horizon. As the character reaches the canyon entrance, the wide landscape narrows into a hazy passage where dust and mist diffuse the afternoon light and sparse scrub replaces the grassland. The scene then shifts deeper into the gorge, with the red walls rising more steeply to obscure the sky and cast the rocky path into heavy shadow. Finally, the camera continues through this narrowing gap, tracking the character toward a sliver of bright light visible in the far distance.
